mapper.select:
SELECT i.id, i.family_id, i.address_id, i.name, i.type, i.purchase_amount, i.purchase_date, i.deactivation_date, i.residual_value, i.remark, i.create_time, i.update_time, i.create_by, i.update_by, i.del_flag, a.name AS address_name FROM bus_item i LEFT JOIN bus_address a ON i.address_id = a.id
i.del_flag = 0 AND i.family_id = #{q.familyId} AND i.address_id = #{q.addressId} AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.name}, '%') AND i.type = #{q.type} AND i.purchase_amount >= #{q.purchaseAmountStart} AND i.purchase_amount <= #{q.purchaseAmountEnd} AND i.purchase_date >= #{q.purchaseDateStart}::date AND i.purchase_date <= #{q.purchaseDateEnd}::date
ORDER BY i.purchase_date DESC
